system.description: Inspired by the tradition of bullfighting, the Toreador style teaches the swordsman to wield a sword in one hand and use a cape in the other to distract and confuse.

benefit.description:
You have honed the art of misdirection to become deadly. On a successful Feint, you can use the Bonus Die for damage instead of to hit.

Against large animals or monsters, you do +2 Dmg.

You also get +1 to any rolls to Trick or Taunt an enemy while wielding a cape.
benefit.name: Ven, Toro!

finalSecret.description: You get a Bonus Die to damage with a successful Riposte if it follows a Dodge or Cloak Parry. An enemy that charges you has a Penalty Die to damage, as you are adept in evading the worst of such an attack.
finalSecret.name: Deadly Diversion
